dialogueChunks.intro: Two of our most respected figures are at each other's throats, {player_name}. {quest_ally} and {target_npc} both believe they should lead, and neither will yield.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Both have their supporters, and the {quest_focus} has split the community down the middle. People are choosing sides instead of working together, and the {quest_threat} is getting worse because of it.
dialogueChunks.outro: Someone outside the dispute needs to talk sense into both of them. Speak with {quest_ally} and {target_npc} separately: find out what it would take for each to stand down before the {quest_stakes} suffer any further.

dialogueChunks.intro: Two of our artisans have been feuding for months, {player_name}. It has gotten so bad that {quest_ally} refuses to work on the same projects as {target_npc}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Both claim superiority and they have dragged the whole settlement into their rivalry over the {quest_focus}. The people caught between them are exhausted by the constant bickering, and the {quest_threat} grows while productivity stalls.
dialogueChunks.outro: Talk to the people who work under both of them. If enough of the settlement speaks with one voice, even these two might listen. {quest_reward_hint} is on the table if you can broker a truce.

dialogueChunks.intro: {quest_ally} challenged {target_npc} to a contest over the {quest_focus}, and what started as bravado has become dangerously reckless, {player_name}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Both are taking bigger risks to outdo the other, and the settlement is egging them on instead of pulling them back. The {quest_threat} {quest_threat_has} turned what should be cooperation into a spectacle {quest_time_pressure}.
dialogueChunks.outro: Talk to {target_npc} and the people closest to both rivals. Someone has to break through the pride before this contest costs us something we cannot replace.
